description: Dataset of available public and private funding programs for AAA game development, including eligibility criteria, funding amounts, and application deadlines. Used to inform the Funding Diversification Strategy.
steps_to_find: Search government portals (e.g., US Small Business Administration, state arts councils).
Review industry reports from game developer associations.
Contact funding agencies for the latest program details.
access_difficulty: Medium – requires registration and agency contact

description: Catalog of current procedural generation tools, libraries, and AI models available to the industry, including open‑source and commercial options. Supports the Procedural Content Strategy.
steps_to_find: Review academic publications and conference proceedings.
Survey vendor websites and open‑source repositories.
Compile a comparative matrix of capabilities and licensing.
access_difficulty: Medium – requires literature review and vendor outreach

description: Performance data (frame rates, load times, memory usage) for comparable open‑world titles on target hardware (e.g., RTX 4090, AMD Radeon). Used to set realistic performance targets.
steps_to_find: Collect benchmark reports from industry analysts.
Gather hardware specifications from vendor datasheets.
Analyze performance metrics relative to target hardware.
access_difficulty: Medium – requires access to benchmark databases

description: Official rating criteria documents from ESRB and PEGI that define content thresholds for each rating level. Essential for ensuring compliance with content standards.
steps_to_find: Download the latest rating guidelines from the ESRB website.
Download the latest PEGI rating criteria from the PEGI website.

description: Official regulatory texts governing data collection, storage, and processing for EU and California residents. Required for the Data Security and Privacy Plan.
steps_to_find: Access the EU GDPR portal for the full text.
Access the California Consumer Privacy Act website for the latest amendments.

document_name: Existing Market Research on AAA Game Trends
description: Industry reports detailing consumer preferences, sales trends, and competitive analysis for AAA open‑world games. Informs the Narrative Complexity and Monetization Strategies.
steps_to_find: Search market research firms (e.g., Newzoo, NPD, SuperData).
Review analyst reports and whitepapers.
Extract key metrics and trend insights.
access_difficulty: Medium – may require subscription or purchase

document_name: Existing Legal Agreements for Government Grants
description: Sample grant agreements, terms, and conditions from government innovation programs that provide funding for advanced technology development.
steps_to_find: Contact relevant government agencies (e.g., US Department of Commerce, state innovation offices).
Request sample grant agreement templates.
Review legal clauses and funding conditions.
access_difficulty: Hard – requires agency negotiation and confidentiality agreements

document_name: Existing Environmental Sustainability Standards for Gaming Industry
description: ISO/IEC standards and industry guidelines that outline best practices for reducing the environmental impact of game development and production.
steps_to_find: Search ISO/IEC database for relevant standards (e.g., ISO 14001, ISO 50001).
Review industry sustainability reports from leading studios.
Compile a list of applicable guidelines.
access_difficulty: Medium – requires access to ISO database and industry reports

description: Official AI ethics frameworks such as IEEE Ethically Aligned Design and ACM Code of Ethics that provide guidance for responsible AI development.
steps_to_find: Download IEEE Ethically Aligned Design from the IEEE website.
Download ACM Code of Ethics from the ACM website.
Review key principles and applicability to procedural content.
